\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
\subsubsection*{template$<$typename L, typename R$>$\newline
class Binary\+Add$<$ L, R $>$}

\mbox{\hyperlink{classBinaryAdd}{Binary\+Add}} \+: Operation d\textquotesingle{}addition entre 2 types. 

Definit une methode static \mbox{\hyperlink{classBinaryAdd_ac123a90a65da025a102309581fd4016b}{get\+Value()}} qui renvoie la somme des deux elements passes par reference a l\textquotesingle{}index i
